ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investment_performance" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year of performance data */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year the performance data was recorded */,
  "dow_performance" REAL /* Performance of the Dow Jones in percentage */,
  "mass_inv_trust_performance" REAL /* Performance of the Mass Investment Trust in percentage */,
  "investors_stock_performance" REAL /* Performance of Investors' stocks in percentage */,
  "tri_cont_performance" REAL /* Performance of Tri-Continental in percentage */,
  "s&p_500_performance" REAL /* Performance of the S&P 500 index in percentage */,
  "nasdaq_performance" REAL /* Performance of the NASDAQ index in percentage */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Annual inflation rate */,
  "economic_growth" REAL /* Annual economic growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of investment */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type (e.g., Mutual Fund, Stock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment type */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average historical return for the investment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment category (e.g., Equity, Fixed Income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment category */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Primary sector or industry focus */,
  "geographical_focus" TEXT /* Geographical focus of the investments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "index_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the financial index */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the index */,
  "benchmark" INTEGER /* Indicates if the index is a benchmark index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_returns" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment return record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* The year associated with the investment return */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* The type of investment being returned (foreign key) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* The category of investment (foreign key) */,
  "performance" REAL /* The performance of the investment in percentage */,
  "quarterly_performance" TEXT /* Performance data for each quarter */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield for the investment */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_returns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES investment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_returns_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES investment_performance ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_returns_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES investment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the investment performance being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES investment_performance ("year_id")
)
